text.p: Reference Letter in Support of Dr 's Request for Donation of Technical Equipment

I write to support Dr 's application for donation of some technical equipment for his research. During Dr 's research stay in Germany, he worked on Nigerian English in the Digital Media, examining the discourse aspects. For Dr to continue his research work on modern technology-mediated communication, he would need some important technical equipment for proper documentation and processing of his data.

The Internet has permitted language to evolve a new medium of communication different in fundamental respect from the traditional speech and writing. Computer-mediated communication, as this is generally called, includes multimodal uses of audio-visual and graphic symbols. Dr would need the necessary audio-visual equipment and processors to capture his data in this new medium. I wish therefore to support his request for donation of the following technical equipment:

Dr 's access to these technical equipment will help to sustain his research efforts and assist his productivity as an academic personnel of this University. Presently, the University is not in a position to provide these necessary equipment due to limited foreign currency reserves. I also assure you that these equipment will be used adequately and effectively maintained.
